mapper.select:
SELECT WID.MATERIAL_NAME AS materialName, WID.SUPPLIER_NAME AS supplierName, WID.SPECIFICATION AS specificationDesc, WID.BRAND AS brand, WID.PURCHASE_QUANTITY AS purchaseQuantity, WID.WAREHOUSE_IN_QUANTITY AS warehouseInQuantity, WID.OUT_QUANTITY AS outQuantity, WID.REMAINING_QUANTITY AS remainingQuantity, WID.UNIT AS unit, WID.WARRANTY_EXPIRY_DATE AS warrantyExpiryDate, WID.PURCHASER_NAME AS purchaserName, WI.WAREHOUSE_IN_DATE AS warehouseInTime FROM E_MATERIAL_WAREHOUSE_IN_DETAIL WID INNER JOIN E_MATERIAL_WAREHOUSE_IN WI ON WID.WAREHOUSE_IN_ID = WI.ID AND WI.ACCEPTANCE_STATUS = 1
WI.WAREHOUSE_ID = #{warehouseId} AND WID.MATERIAL_ID = #{materialId}
AND WI.WAREHOUSE_IN_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{warehouseInTimeStart}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND WI.WAREHOUSE_IN_DATE <= TO_DATE(#{warehouseInTimeEnd}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
ORDER BY WI.WAREHOUSE_IN_DATE DESC, WID.CREATE_TIME ASC

SELECT REL.ID AS id, REL.WAREHOUSE_IN_DETAIL_ID AS warehouseInDetailId, REL.WAREHOUSE_OUT_DETAIL_ID AS warehouseOutDetailId, REL.QUANTITY AS quantity, MC.MATERIAL_CODE AS materialCode, MC.MATERIAL_NAME AS materialName, WI.ID AS warehouseInId, WI.WAREHOUSE_IN_NO AS warehouseInNo, WI.WAREHOUSE_IN_DATE AS warehouseInDate, WI.WAREHOUSE_IN_TITLE AS warehouseInTitle, WO.ID AS warehouseOutId, WO.WAREHOUSE_OUT_NO AS warehouseOutNo, WO.CREATE_TIME AS warehouseOutDate, WO.WAREHOUSE_OUT_TITLE AS warehouseOutTitle, 2 AS operationType, WO.CREATE_TIME AS operationTime, REL.CREATE_TIME AS createTime FROM E_MAT_WAREHOUSE_IN_OUT_REL REL INNER JOIN E_MATERIAL_WAREHOUSE_IN_DETAIL WID ON REL.WAREHOUSE_IN_DETAIL_ID = WID.ID INNER JOIN E_MATERIAL_WAREHOUSE_IN WI ON WID.WAREHOUSE_IN_ID = WI.ID INNER JOIN E_MATERIAL_CODE MC ON WID.MATERIAL_ID = MC.ID AND MC.DEL_FLAG = 0 INNER JOIN E_MAT_WAREHOUSE_OUT_DETAIL WOD ON REL.WAREHOUSE_OUT_DETAIL_ID = WOD.ID INNER JOIN E_MAT_WAREHOUSE_OUT WO ON WOD.WAREHOUSE_OUT_ID = WO.ID WHERE WI.WAREHOUSE_ID = #{warehouseId} AND WID.MATERIAL_ID = #{materialId} AND WI.ACCEPTANCE_STATUS = 1
AND WI.WAREHOUSE_IN_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{warehouseInTimeStart}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND WI.WAREHOUSE_IN_DATE <= TO_DATE(#{warehouseInTimeEnd}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
ORDER BY REL.CREATE_TIME DESC,WI.WAREHOUSE_IN_NO
